name: Curl Download And Execute Combination
notes:
This rule detects potential attackers using curl to download payloads remotely and execute them.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Sreeman, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Curl Download And Execute Combination
SIGMA Description: Adversaries can use curl to download payloads remotely and execute them. Curl is included by default in Windows 10 build 17063 and later.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success
when the event matches Command (custom) contains all of [ /c or curl or http or -o or &]
TD_list: APPLY Curl Download And Execute Combination on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success
AND when the event matches Command (custom) contains all of [ /c  or curl  or http or -o or &]
RED_list: Event name: Curl Download And Execute Combination
Event description: detects potential attackers using curl to download payloads remotely and execute them.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
